checks.description: When the multiplication completes (done asserted), the product output yout must equal the arithmetic product of the inputs ain and bin that were presented at start.
notes: Uses the concrete stimulus from basic_001 where ain=1 and bin=2.
checks.pass_condition: If done==1 then yout == ain * bin (32-bit unsigned multiplication).
checks.trigger_condition: When done transitions to 1 after a start operation.

checks.description: A done pulse must be preceded by a start pulse in the same execution scenario.
notes: Ensures protocol ordering without assuming latency.
checks.pass_condition: For every occurrence of done==1, there exists a prior start==1 event that has not been matched to a previous done.
